Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Redflower family]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The many Paths of the Redflower family grow food and bring rain throughout the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — The Redflower family was untouched during the battle.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Redflower family has a presence in Stormrock and uses it as their family headquarters during emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — The Redflower family provides food and irrigation to the Blackflame Empire.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — The Redflower family pulls mobile gardens.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Redflower family's symbol is a red blossom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — Members of the Redflower family wear Goldsigns with a crimson flower on their chests.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Lowgolds stood over the Redflower family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — The Redflower family has a burning wagon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — The Redflower family got away.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
